title: iPSC Transduction
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fls7u","text":"Note: ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pngc","text":"Cells will need to be maintained in StemFlex medium to reform healthy iPSCs colony-like morphology (4-5 days) ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"827jm","text":"Given that we don’t know what viral titer will be toxic to the cells during transduction we will have to optimize the transduction as we progress ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"c44gv","text":"Material needed: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9q0n9","text":"Packaged virus ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3jhkd","text":"Polybrene (diluted 100µg/mL) ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6auj5","text":"Stem flex (+) warmed to room temperature ~ 10 to 15min ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9qgsf","text":"Vitronectin-coated plates (coating to final concentration of 1.0µg/cm2)","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":69,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Split iPS cells into single cells in complete medium with RVC. (500µl per well)
Seed cells at 5.0X104 cells in glass-bottom 24-well plates
Remove the culture medium from cells, add ( 300µL) fresh medium without RVC into each well
Add 45µl virus and 1µg/ml polybrene into cells and mix it. Incubate in 37 degree, 5% CO2. Well 1 Well 2 Well 3 Control 1 PLVX mCherry HLA-A2 PLVX IRES-Puro HLA-A2 pLoc Mlana
Add Polybrene into the infected well to make the final concentration to be 1ug/ml.

Make a 100x dilution to make a working concentration of 100µg/mL (10mg/mL) (V stock ) = (100µg/mL)(0.5mL) V stock = 5µL of stock into 495µL of DPBS (-)(-) (100µg/mL) (V stock ) = (1µg/mL)(0.3mL) --> V stock = 3µL of working concentration per 300µL of medium added
Monitor the cells for the next 48 hours
Check IRES-GFP or HLA-A2’s expression at least 48 hours after the transduction.
For antibiotic-based selection, the cells will be maintained to reform colonies and subsequently grown in medium with 1µg/mL of Puromycin to initiate selection
creator: Jackson Schumacher
